meaning: n.枝,分枝,分部,分店,(学科)分科,部门,支流,支脉v.出现分歧
examples: He chopped a branch off the tree.
Deposits can be made at any branch.
A branch whipped across the car window.
He only applied for a job as a branch manager with Hertz to please his mother.
Staff Sergeant Edgar D Bledsoe, of Olive Branch, Illinois, cradles a critically ill Vietnamese infant.
